title: Assorted Military Uniforms (1850s-1970s)
description: It's just a uniform pack mod to accommodate musket till self-loading/semi-auto era roleplaying with Villager Recruits
body:
Published to correspond with Talhanation's villager recruits mod compatibility with Ewewukek's musket mod
This mod gonna cover the timeframe between 1850 and 1975 (for LARP purposes)

As the title stated, this mod adds uniforms and stuff, mainly for LARP purpose as stated above, and I only add custom countries instead of IRL countries, IRL stuff will be published separate

No other functions added beside uniforms that are armors, note that you should NOT wear it when you're using a skin w/ overlay since it'll clip thru the uniform (I'll keep the uniform slim and won't change it as setting the width the same as vanilla armors will make it too chonky as it is supposed to be worn by the villagers, meaning that YOU need to make your own skin for it)

For now, the only available uniform packs are the "Astorians", a custom state I made based on Denmark and Romania in terms of uniforms, "Schwazen" i.e. fictional Germany, and "Steinzmarkt", a custom state I made based on minor German states but more will be added soon (No IRL countries at this moment).

Version: 1.19.2\
Dependency: Forge, nothing much\
Best with:
- Talhanation's Villager Recruits and Workers
- Ewewukek's Musket Mod
- Create mod for industrial vibes

![Few uniforms](url "https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/oMr39YvD/images/d86eb05e2ff806445a8fc3cc1588d16f92d6d6bf.png")

For issues, contact me on discord
Username: creamerism
